data.body: COMPLETION_VERIFIER: All 4 story Done Definitions satisfied. (1) Part C section with tuple output format exists. (2) Trigger condition (2+ consumers outside own directory) specified. (3) Raw scan output, not summaries. (4) Structural boundary tests per Rule 5: test_pipeline_contains_part_c_section and test_pipeline_part_c_output_format pass GREEN (9/9 tests). Task AC amendments requiring body-text phrase assertions were removed during code review as Rule 5 violations — behavioral testing standard prohibits grep assertions on instruction file body text.
